one_time_description: BC FN Gaming Revenue Sharing LP - not budgeted, appears as new one-time revenue source in 2020
economic_notes: Anspayaxw Development Corporation operates forestry activities and is consolidated. Gas Bar and Forestry Services is a significant revenue source.
notes: Consolidated entity includes Anspayaxw Development Corporation (forestry). Ottawa Trust Funds held by Indigenous Services Canada. Replacement reserve of $163,464 held in separate bank account per CMHC agreement. Band Council has provided loan guarantees of $483,842 on five individual home loans. COVID-19 noted with minimal expected financial impact. Revolving loan authorized to $350,000 at prime plus 2%. Total government transfers estimated as GGC ($4,046,176) + CMHC ($39,364) + Gitxsan Heath Society ($104,673) = $4,190,213 but using GGC + CMHC + BC FN Gaming as government sources = $4,732,102; used GGC + CMHC + Gitxsan Heath + BC FN Gaming = $4,836,775 rounded to segment totals. isc_funding set to GGC only. total_government_transfers includes GGC + CMHC + BC FN Gaming Revenue Sharing LP + Gitxsan Heath Society.
